title: Hedonic Body Brush with Natural Soft & Stiff Bristles - Long Handle Back Scrubber for Shower & Bath Use for Dry Brushing Exfoliating Washing Lymphatic Drainage Dry Skin Cellulite Scrub Massage Bathing
features: REVITALIZE YOUR SKIN - Achieve radiant, silky skin, buff away dead cells, and combat cellulite and prevent ingrown hairs. Back exfoliator brush & body exfoliating brush for both dry and wet brushing. Reach everywhere, great alternative to loofah.

REJUVINATE YOUR BODY - Regular dry brushing detoxifies and refreshes your skin. Its natural bristles strike the perfect balance: stiff to exfoliate, yet gentle enough not to scratch. The back brush that helps you elevate your skincare ritual.

REACH YOUR WHOLE BODY - Long handle that is great for scrubbing your back, legs, and other hard-to-reach areas, ensuring super smooth, soft skin everywhere. Eco friendly conscious choice, bamboo wooden body brush dry brush with all natural bristles.

DOUBLE SIDED - Discover versatility with our two-sided brush. One side boasts soft bristles for gentle exfoliation, while the other features hard bristles for deeper cleansing. Tailor your skincare to every need with the Hedonio shower brush.

100% CUSTOMER SATISFACTION - Adore our shower & bath brush or do you need a change? We're committed to your happiness. Not satisfied? Opt for a replacement or full refund. Your satisfaction is our success.
